title: Exercises: Classical Control Systems for QEC

exercises.title: Latency Budget Calculator
exercises.description: Design a latency budget calculator for QEC control systems.
hints: Decoder latency scales with code distance

exercises.title: Pauli Frame Tracker
exercises.description: Implement a Pauli frame tracking system.
tasks: Track X and Z components for each qubit
Propagate frame through H, S, CNOT gates
hints: Frame is 2 bits per qubit (X, Z)
H swaps X and Z components
CNOT: X propagates forward, Z backward
Cash out before T: apply physical gates

exercises.title: Lookup Table Generator
exercises.description: Generate lookup table decoders for small codes.
tasks: Compute minimum weight correction for each

exercises.title: Control Hierarchy Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate a hierarchical control system for multiple logical qubits.
tasks: Model local controllers for 4 logical qubits
Simulate syndrome cycle with realistic timing
